summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of AYUSH Healthcare Marketplace homepage (StunningHomePage.js). All major homepage features working correctly - hero carousel, product sections, navigation, health concerns, brands, stats, CTA, newsletter, footer. Minor issue found on AuthPage.

ui_bugs.issue: Runtime error 'A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string' appeared once during rapid navigation from Add to Cart redirect. Could not reproduce on direct access.

action_items: Investigate intermittent Select.Item error on AuthPage - may occur during rapid navigation
critical_code_review_comments: StunningHomePage.js is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes
All interactive elements have appropriate test identifiers
Proper error handling for Add to Cart when user not logged in
Responsive design is properly implemented for mobile views
test_credentials: N/A - No login required for homepage testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Homepage fully tested. All 15 features from requirements passed. AuthPage works when accessed directly but showed one-time error during rapid redirect. Mobile responsiveness verified.
